channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Amanda Knox: A Bubbly Drama Without Closure
item.description: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox is an eight-part series that revisits the infamous 2007 murder of Meredith Kercher and the subsequent legal saga involving her roommate, Amanda Knox. The show, executiv...

item.title: Buffel grass spread after heavy rainfall intensifies environmental and cultural concerns across Central Australia
item.description: Record rainfall has transformed Australia's Red Centre into an unusually green landscape, but environmental groups, Traditional Owners and many Alice Springs residents say the change reflects the rapi...

item.title: U.S. Conducts Airstrikes on Iranian Infrastructure Amid Escalating Conflict
item.description: The United States has intensified its airstrikes against Iran, targeting bridges and a key port tower in Hormozgan province as part of a broader campaign to pressure Tehran over its control of the Str...

item.title: Security Forces Kill 24 Terrorists in Bannu District Operation
item.description: In a significant security operation, Pakistani military forces have eliminated at least 24 terrorists linked to the Indian-backed Fitna Al-Khwarij group in Bannu district. The Inter-Services Public Re...

item.title: Ruto Announces Infrastructure Projects and Political Outreach in Bungoma Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: President William Ruto met with grassroots leaders from Bungoma County, led by Kimilili MP Didmus Barasa, at State House Nairobi to outline a multi-billion-shilling development agenda for Western Keny...

item.title: Ileje District Council Unveils Plan to Enhance Agricultural Markets
item.description: The Ileje District Council in Tanzania has announced a strategic initiative to construct modern markets aimed at improving agricultural productivity and commercialization. This project, unveiled durin...

item.title: Susan Africa Explains Viral 'Ubo-Ubo Acting' Image as Mandela Effect
item.description: Susan Africa, a popular Filipino actress, recently addressed the controversy surrounding her viral 'ubo-ubo acting' image, which sparked widespread debate online. She clarified that the image, which a...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Escalates as Iran and US Exchange Strikes, Casualties Rise
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between Iran and the United States in the Middle East, with significant casualties reported in Iran following renewed military actions. Iran's health minist...

item.title: Ebonyi Police Conduct Autopsy on Mary Habila After Family Opposition
item.description: Mary Habila, a 26-year-old physiotherapist, died at the residence of Nigerian Minister David Umahi in Ebonyi State. Despite her family's objections, the Ebonyi State Police Command has insisted on con...

item.title: Belfast Hit-and-Run Incident Claims 24-Year-Old Woman's Life, Driver Arrested
item.description: A 24-year-old woman from County Tipperary, Raven Adams, died after being struck by a car in a hit-and-run incident in north Belfast on July 16, 2026. The collision occurred at approximately 2:40 a.m. ...

item.title: Saskatchewan denies child care operator licenses, sparking concerns over access
item.description: Applicants for child care operator licenses in Saskatchewan are facing rejections, raising concerns about access to affordable childcare. Kinza Nissar, a childcare provider, shared her experience of b...

item.title: Nintendo Music Adds Donkey Kong Bananza Soundtrack with Over 229 Tracks
item.description: Nintendo Music has recently expanded its library with the full soundtrack of Donkey Kong Bananza, featuring 229 tracks spanning over 8 hours and 36 minutes. This addition to the Switch Online app incl...

item.title: China's Kimi K3 AI Model Reaches 2.8 Trillion Parameters, Competes with U.S. Models
item.description: Moonshot AI, a Chinese tech firm, has unveiled Kimi K3, its first open AI model surpassing 2.8 trillion parameters. The model features a 1-million-token context window and claims a 2.5× improvement in...

item.title: Two Reiger Park Athletes Overcome Struggles to Qualify for Deadly Dozen World Championship
item.description: David Koela Foster, 42, and Reginald Rashid Ayer, 41, from Boksburg's Reiger Park community, have qualified for the 2026 Deadly Dozen World Championships after transforming their lives through fitness...

item.title: UK Announces Visa-Free Travel Agreement with Over 30 Nations
item.description: The UK government has revised its immigration rules, allowing citizens from over 30 countries to visit Britain without a traditional visa. Eligible travelers can now apply for an Electronic Travel Aut...

item.title: Australian woman missing in US: Sisters share fears and updates
item.description: The sisters of Sally Contarino, an Australian woman who has been missing in the United States, have shared their concerns and updates regarding her disappearance. The article highlights their emotiona...

item.title: George Lucas discusses AI's impact on filmmaking through historical analogy
item.description: In an interview for Rabbit's Foot, Andy Hazel discusses George Lucas's views on generative AI in filmmaking. Lucas, creator of Star Wars and founder of the Lucas Museum of Narrative Art, draws a paral...

item.title: US Limits Foreign Students' Stay to Four Years Under New Visa Rules
item.description: The US Department of Homeland Security has introduced new visa rules limiting foreign students to a maximum of four years in the country. This change affects international students with F visas, cultu...

item.title: Fourth Suspect Surrenders in Marine Biologist's Killing, Police Hunt for Others
item.description: A fourth suspect in the killing of American marine biologist Kent Carpenter has surrendered to the police, according to a report by the Negros Oriental Provincial Police Office. The suspect, who serve...

item.title: Security Forces Conduct Joint Operations Against Terrorists in Bannu District
item.description: Security forces in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa's Bannu district and its surrounding areas have successfully neutralized 24 terrorists linked to the banned Tehreek-i-Taliban (TTP), according to a statement by t...
